title: What the RPi Actually Does
alt: Checklist of the five core duties of the Responsible Person for import

items.label: Confirm QP certification
items.desc: Verify each batch was QP-certified abroad to UK GMP-equivalent standards

items.label: Review supporting evidence
items.desc: Examine certification statements and audit trail against ALCOA+

items.label: Verify supply-chain provenance
items.desc: Confirm an authorised source via a controlled route, no gaps

items.label: Maintain written procedures
items.desc: Own the SOPs governing how confirmation is performed and recorded

items.label: Escalate and withhold
items.desc: Query, delay or refuse confirmation when evidence falls short
